description: P&L, balance sheet, or management accounts — extract period, entity, and key financial figures

fields.name: entity_name
fields.prompt: Extract the legal entity name or company name for which this financial statement was prepared.

fields.name: statement_type
fields.prompt: Identify the type of financial statement: 'profit_and_loss', 'balance_sheet', 'cash_flow', 'management_accounts', or 'other'.

fields.name: period_start
fields.prompt: Extract the financial period start date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

fields.name: period_end
fields.prompt: Extract the financial period end date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

fields.name: currency
fields.prompt: Extract the 3-letter ISO 4217 currency code for this statement (e.g. GBP, USD, EUR).

fields.name: total_revenue
fields.prompt: Extract total revenue or turnover as a plain number. Return null if not present.

fields.name: gross_profit
fields.prompt: Extract gross profit as a plain number. Return null if not present.

fields.name: operating_profit
fields.prompt: Extract operating profit (EBIT) as a plain number. Return null if not present.

fields.name: net_profit
fields.prompt: Extract net profit (profit after tax) as a plain number. Return null if not present.

fields.name: total_assets
fields.prompt: Extract total assets as a plain number (balance sheet). Return null if not applicable.

fields.name: total_liabilities
fields.prompt: Extract total liabilities as a plain number (balance sheet). Return null if not applicable.

fields.name: equity
fields.prompt: Extract total equity or net assets as a plain number (balance sheet). Return null if not applicable.

fields.name: prepared_by
fields.prompt: Extract the name of the accountant, firm, or preparer. Return null if not stated.
